description: A telecommunications company is planning a new Ka-band satellite ground station gateway in Jakarta, Indonesia (~6°S, 106°E). Using Panoply and the NCEP precipitation data in ~/PanoplyData/, determine the peak climatological precipitation rate for this location to calculate the required transmit power margin. Create a 1D time-series line plot of precipitation for the grid point closest to Jakarta and extract the peak values. Deliver the plot and a structured report as specified in the engineering ticket located at ~/Desktop/rf_gateway_ticket.txt.

metadata.occupation: Satellite Communications Engineer / RF Systems Engineer
